scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
